klmWeylInputStatus.label: all-omega KLM/Weyl positivity input
klmWeylInputStatus.reason: The uniform omega bridge proves original Weyl positivity and the hbar=1 KLM positive-type condition for Q_omega for every |omega|<1/2.

bridgeStatementIsolatedStatus.label: RH/de Branges bridge statement isolated
bridgeStatementIsolatedStatus.reason: The final implication is packaged as the shifted-Xi zero-location consequence theorem, with kernel positivity and endpoint zero exclusion audited in lower layers.

klmToDeBrangesTransformStatus.label: KLM-to-de Branges transform
klmToDeBrangesTransformStatus.reason: The endpoint consequence theorem imports the shifted-Xi positive kernel family.  The detailed augmented closed-cone construction is audited one layer lower.

criticalEndpointClosureStatus.label: critical endpoint and positive-cone closure
criticalEndpointClosureStatus.reason: The endpoint consequence theorem imports the positive-kernel closure and the shifted-Xi zero-location endpoint passage.

rhDeBrangesConclusionStatus.label: Riemann hypothesis / de Branges conclusion
rhDeBrangesConclusionStatus.reason: Formal chain closed, conditional on the imported KLM/Weyl and augmented closed-cone bridge certificates.  The endpoint zero-location consequence theorem supplies the final Xi zero exclusion.

provedBridgeTheorem: The all-omega KLM/Weyl positive family transports to the shifted-Xi positive-kernel endpoint consequence through the augmented bridge.
endpointPassageTheorem: The shifted-Xi zero-location consequence theorem implies all zeros of Xi(z)=xi(1/2+i z) are real.
caution: The formal ledger is closed, but this does not substitute for publication-grade independent verification of the imported KLM/Weyl, augmented repair, and closed-cone bridge certificates.
nextProofTarget: Audit remaining non-endpoint proof layers, starting with the augmented trace quotient compatibility limsup/liminf passage.
